after.description: Start of the time range. Accepts relative formats like '-7d', '-24h' or ISO 8601 timestamps. Defaults to '-7d'.

before.description: End of the time range. Same format as 'after'. Defaults to now.

breakdown_by.description:
Group the series by metric 'name' or 'kind'. Defaults to 'kind'.

* `name` - name
* `kind` - kind

id.description: A UUID string identifying this hog flow.

instance_id.description: Filter metrics to a specific execution instance.

interval.description:
Time bucket size for the series. One of: hour, day, week. Defaults to 'day'.

* `hour` - hour
* `day` - day
* `week` - week

kind.description: Comma-separated metric kinds to filter by, e.g. 'success,failure'.

name.description: Comma-separated metric names to filter by.
